papers.title: Role-Based Task Distribution in YAWL
papers.title_ja: YAWLにおけるロールベースのタスク分配
papers.summary: What happens when workflow tasks are assigned to an entire role rather than a specific user?This video introduces the role-based distribution pattern as a resource allocation mechanism in YAWL. The tutorial explains how role-based distribution makes a task available to all users who belong to a specified role, instead of assigning it to a single predefined individual. Using a simple workflow example involving store clerks and managers, the video demonstrates how a task is offered to multiple users simultaneously and remains visible in their work lists until one user accepts it. Once the task is taken, it is automatically removed from the work lists of the remaining users. The behavior is illustrated through both an animated explanation and a live execution in the YAWL system. Viewers learn how role-based distribution supports flexible task allocation in environments where multiple users are equally qualified to perform a task. The example highlights how this pattern balances flexibilit...

papers.title_ja: 調整可能な粘弾性特性を有する軟質複合材料の3Dプリンティング
papers.summary: The ability to precisely control spatially varying visco-hyperelastic properties of soft materials is an emerging need towards the development of biomimetic compliant structures. Multi-material additive manufacturing has shown promise as an effective method in achieving this goal, however commonly used methods are expensive and limited in material capabilities. This work firstly presents novel soft composites, consisting of a silicone matrix and thermoplastic elastomer reinforcements, fabricated through low-cost extrusion-based additive manufacturing. A customized 3D printer with direct ink write (DIW) and fused filament fabrication (FFF) capabilities is used to print composites with a sinusoidal reinforcement pattern in which hyperelastic properties are tuned and spatially varied through the frequency and amplitude of the reinforcement. Feature scaling, normalization, and stratified sampling were applied to prepare training and test sets. papers.title: Combating Data and Target Shifts in Visual Tasks
papers.title_ja: ビジョンタスクにおけるデータとターゲットシフトへの対抗
papers.summary: The rapid advancement of deep learning models for visual tasks has led to significant progress in many domains. However, a key challenge remains: ensuring that models can generalize effectively to unseen samples or novel classes, especially in real-world scenarios where training data-target pairs are often limited or unavailable, and test data may exhibit shifts in both data and targets. This thesis addresses the problem of shifts across data and targets, proposing novel methods to improve model generalization and transferability in complex settings. The thesis identifies the different shift scenarios for visual tasks and presents their problem forms. The research first relaxes the static target distribution assumption in Multi-Domain Generalization (mDG) tasks, introducing the General Multi-Domain Generalization (GMDG) objective to improve generalization under varying data shifts. papers.summary: The global energy transition towards renewables and the proliferation of electrified transportation are driving an unprecedented demand for power conversion systems that achieve ultra-high power density, high reliability, and bidirectional power flow. Wide band gap (WBG) semiconductors, particularly Gallium Nitride (GaN), offer a pathway to this goal. Among them, the monolithic bidirectional switch (BiS) is recognized as a pivotal component capable of revolutionizing converter topologies by simplifying circuitry and minimizing parasitic elements. However, the development and adoption of GaN-based BiSs are critically hindered by a triad of intertwined challenges: a scarcity of mature and optimized device structures, a complete absence of standardized methodologies for characterizing their dynamic performance, and a lack of system-level topologies designed to exploit their unique advantages fully. papers.title: An investigation into the distribution of gains from merging
papers.title_ja: 企業合併による利益配分の調査
papers.summary: The thesis critically analyzes the economic and financial rationale for merging, both in order to gain some insight into why mergers might be profitable to shareholders, and in order to properly construct hypotheses and tests which might determine the profitability of merging to shareholders. A second purpose is to obtain evidence from monthly Stock Exchange share prices of abnormal gains and losses to shareholders in the U. K. Breweries and Distilleries industry companies as a result of mergers. The industry sample of seventy two mergers is also used to estimate the distribution of gains and losses between acquired and acquiring companies, and the gains from insider dealings by acquirers.
papers.summary_ja: 企業合併の経済的・財務的根拠を批判的に分析し、合併がなぜ株主に利益をもたらすかを考察する。合併の収益性に関する仮説と検証方法を構築する。

papers.summary: Policing is a stressful profession, and effective leadership is needed to mitigate the effects of organizational stressors that make it one of the most hazardous occupations in the world. Evidence suggests that transformational and transactional leadership can influence the health outcomes and commitment levels of officers, but much of the research and strategies are derived from large jurisdictions and have failed to account for smaller resource constrained contexts. Therefore, the viability of these strategies in smaller jurisdictions such as those in the Caribbean are understudied. Studies have tended to apply quantitative methodologies, which do not give officers a voice to fully capture their contextual experiences that ultimately shape their work related outcomes. To address this gap, more context specific research is needed which captures the voice of officers and investigates how leadership directly impacts organizational commitment and wellness in smaller jurisdictions. papers.summary: This study is informed by twenty-five years of clinical experience in the fields of eating disorders and addiction, drawing upon observations from both private practice and supervision of rehabilitation facilities. It responds to emerging evidence indicating that rates of eating disorders in males are rising more rapidly than in females, with no significant difference in the clinical severity of symptoms between sexes. Despite these trends, treatment approaches specifically tailored for men remain under-explored, particularly within the field of Analytical Psychology. To address this deficit, this research shifts the traditional analytical focus from the mother to the father-son relationship to better understand the development of eating disorders in men. The study introduces a new conceptual framework, the "Male Eating Disorder Matrix," which operationalizes four primary clinical positions: Shame, Identification and blueprint for development, Father figure, and Power struggle. papers.summary: This qualitative research explores what group psychotherapy can offer adolescents experiencing gender-related distress (GRD). An exponential increase in young people seeking help for GRD over the last 15 years, amid legal challenge and public dispute about the ethics and efficacy of associated medical intervention, has focussed attention on what psychological therapies can contribute to an appropriate response. The Cass Review - commissioned to make recommendations on NHS care for this population - stated that ‘a much better understanding is needed’ about the increasing numbers presenting for help, ‘their support needs, and the full range of potential treatment options’ (Cass 2022, p.39). While the diverse and often complex antecedents and manifestations of adolescent GRD indicate no one model will fit all, this study aims to better understand what group psychotherapy can offer this cohort as one such option. It examines a provision informed by psychoanalytic, group analytic, mentaliza...
papers.summary_ja: 過去15年間に急増した性別関連困難を経験する思春期の青年に対して、集団心理療法がもたらす有効性を定性的に検証する。当該治療法の倫理性と有効性についての公的議論の最中での実践研究である。
papers.novelty_reason: 性別関連困難の青年への集団心理療法は急速に増加する社会現象に対応した新たな臨床実践分野であり、倫理的文脈も含めた包括的検証が新規である。

papers.title_ja: 処理深度、学習者適性、第二言語英語文法構造習得：口頭練習を通じた獲得メカニズム
papers.summary: Depth of Processing (DoP) is central to several models of instructed second language acquisition (ISLA) (Leow, 2015). While DoP has been extensively examined in vocabulary learning (e.g., Laufer & Hulstijn, 2001), its role in the acquisition of grammatical structures, particularly through oral and audio-visual modalities remains comparatively underexplored. Drawing on the Levels of Processing framework (Craik & Lockhart, 1972), this study investigated whether task-induced processing depth influences the acquisition of third conditionals and comparatives, and whether language aptitude (LLAMA B, D, F) predicts learning gains. Using a pretest–posttest design, four intact classes involving 108 Grade 8 EFL learners in India were assigned to one of the three experimental conditions differing in level and type of processing: Low DoP, High DoP Explicit, and High DoP Implicit. The treatment task required the participants to listen to an audio-visual story containing the target structure...
papers.summary_ja: 第二言語習得における処理深度の役割を、特に文法構造の習得に焦点を当てて検証する。語彙学習では多くの研究が蓄積されているが、口頭練習を通じた文法習得における処理深度の影響は未解明である。
papers.novelty_reason: 処理深度理論自体は既知だが、特定の学習モダリティとしての口頭練習における文法習得への応用は相対的に新しい。

papers.title: China’s Pandemic Biopolitics: Handling HIV/AIDS and COVID-19
papers.title_ja: 中国のパンデミック・バイオポリティクス：HIV/AIDS および COVID-19 への対処
papers.summary: This thesis critically examines China's approach to managing the HIV/AIDS and COVID-19 pandemics, contrasting the government’s intention of control with the lived experience of these infections. It is based on a mixed-method design where I have collected and analysed secondary materials (media narratives and published policy/governmental documents), interviews with individuals, and online/offline ethnographies. Drawing on Michel Foucault’s concept of biopolitics, I examine how the Chinese government’s responses to the pandemics enhanced its control of the population by attempting to manipulate and steer the processes of knowledge production. I critically employ this Foucauldian approach, considering China's unique political landscape, marked by a mix of one-party authoritarianism conjoined with neoliberalism and discuss the significance and challenges of using this theoretical framework in a context different to those of neoliberal modes of governance. The thesis begins with a focus on...
papers.summary_ja: 中国政府によるHIV/AIDS および COVID-19 パンデミア対応を、統治意図と感染者の生きられた経験の対比において批判的に検証する。混合方法論により、二次資料と一次データの分析から政策と実践のギャップを明らかにしている。
papers.novelty_reason: バイオポリティクス枠組みによる2つのパンデミアの比較分析は、非西欧的なパンデミア統治様式を政治理論的に新たに照射する新規性を持つ。

papers.title: The nature and tensions of environmental management control in local authorities
papers.title_ja: 地方自治体における環境管理統制の性質と緊張：実装プラクティスの探究的研究
papers.authors: Christophe Maurel, Christophe Favoreu, London Proofreaders
papers.summary: This exploratory research aims to characterize, on the one hand, the concept of environmental management control (EMC) through the practices that underpin it, and, on the other hand, the tensions associated with it and the implementation of these practices in public organizations. Although EMC is attracting growing interest within the public sector, it seems to be facing technical and governance difficulties. A grid for analyzing management tools and the theory of organizational paradoxes is used to address the issue of characterizing EMC practices and the associated tensions in the local public sector. Various municipalities were mobilized to explore and characterize their first experiences of implementing EMC. Our results enable us to characterize both the tools used and the tensions generated between the objectives pursued in terms of resource management, dialogue with the socio-economic environment, and behavioral orientation.
papers.summary_ja: 公共組織における環境管理統制の概念を、その実装プラクティスおよび関連する緊張を特性化する探究的研究。環境管理統制の理論化と実装上の矛盾を明らかにしている。
papers.novelty_reason: 公共部門の環境管理は既知の課題だが、統制メカニズムの緊張構造の体系的分析は相対的に未発達である。

papers.title: Towards a transformative and territorial leadership: The case of organic farming development in Occitanie
papers.title_ja: 変革的で領域志向のリーダーシップへ向けて：フランス・オクシタニア地方の有機農業発展事例
papers.authors: Pierre Triboulet, Charlène Arnaud, Liz Carey-Libbrecht
papers.summary: The aim of this article is to characterize the modalities of transformative leadership in support of local public action. It posits that this transformation is based on both the democratic and the distributed dimensions of leadership, and that it is concretely manifested in the territory concerned. To operationalize the concept of Territorial Transformative Leadership (TTL), it draws on a case study of a French Region, Occitanie, which is leading the political project to transform production methods from conventional to organic farming (OF). Twenty semi-structured interviews were conducted in Occitanie. Our results show the analytical potential of the concept of TTL, which reveals (dis)equilibria between the two dimensions of TTL, and questions both the ecosystem of actors driving public action, and the interdependencies between ecosystem and territory.
papers.summary_ja: 地方公共政策を支援する変革的リーダーシップの様式を特性化し、民主的かつ分散型のリーダーシップ原理が地域的実装においてどのように具現化されるかを検証する。
papers.novelty_reason: 領域を基盤とした分散型リーダーシップと変革的実践の結合は、従来のトップダウン的統治モデルに対する新たなアプローチを提示している。

papers.title: The Role of Social Media Influencers in Promoting Therapeutic Compliance: Implications for Public Health Policy
papers.title_ja: 治療コンプライアンス促進におけるソーシャルメディア・インフルエンサーの役割：公衆衛生政策への含意
papers.authors: Léna Griset, Loick Menvielle, Rupanwita Dash
papers.summary: Treatment adherence (hereafter, adherence) is critical to achieving positive therapeutic outcomes, whereas non-adherence remains a major public health challenge that hinders recovery and increases healthcare expenditures. As social media has become a prominent channel for information consumption and sharing, social media influencers (SMIs) may play an important role in enhancing adherence. Yet the mechanisms through which engagement with SMIs promotes adherence are not well understood. Drawing on the source attractiveness model, this study posits that influencer characteristics – specifically social attractiveness and perceived credibility – shape evaluations of health messages and, in turn, persuade followers toward adherence. We examine the relationship between SMI social attractiveness and adherence, test the mediating roles of perceived authenticity and perceived expertise, and explore the moderating role of SMI message type. Using survey data from 475 participants, we find that SM...
papers.summary_ja: 治療アドヒアランスが療養成果達成に不可欠である状況において、ソーシャルメディア・インフルエンサーがアドヒアランス促進に果たしうる役割を検証する。情報消費メディアの変化と公衆衛生介入の新たな可能性を示唆している。
papers.novelty_reason: ソーシャルメディア・インフルエンサーを医療アウトカム改善の文脈に位置づけることは、デジタル時代の公衆衛生実践への新たなアプローチである。

papers.title: A semi-autonomous public organization’s legitimation work: the case of the survival of an actor in the disability field
papers.title_ja: 半自律的公共組織の正当性構築：障害分野における一組織の生存事例
papers.authors: Alexandre Salvatori, Sarah Richard, François Grima
papers.summary: This qualitative study, based on semi-structured interviews and ethnography, starts from the observation that little research has been done on maintaining the legitimacy of semi-autonomous public organizations in a context constrained by certain principles of New Public Management. These principles question the legitimacy of public organizations as the most relevant actors for meeting user expectations. In this article, we study the case of GHP, a semi-autonomous public organization of the “agency” type based in France, which manages a public fund. Based on neo-institutional theory, the study seeks to understand the involvement of actors in the dynamics of maintaining the internal and external legitimacy that ensures the sustainability of an organization. We show that maintaining legitimacy and its alignment between internal and external sources is achieved in a process involving four stages: challenges, maintenance, diffusion, and consensus. Institutional entrepreneurs within the orga...
papers.summary_ja: ニューパブリック・マネジメント原理によって制約される文脈において、半自律的公共組織の正当性維持に関する研究は稀少である。本研究は半構造化インタビューおよび民族誌的方法により、障害分野の組織事例を通じて正当性構築メカニズムを明らかにする。
papers.novelty_reason: NPM 時代における半自律的組織の正当性維持という課題は、公共組織研究において相対的に見過ごされてきた領域である。

papers.title: The Role of Collective Bricolage in Creating University Governance Structures: The Example of the Galileo Observatory
papers.title_ja: 大学ガバナンス構造創造における集団ブリコラージュの役割：ガリレオ天文台の事例
papers.summary: This study investigates the concept of “collective bricolage” within the framework of creating a universe science observatory in France. In the face of significant transformations in higher education and research, this article examines how university stakeholders can employ collective bricolage to adapt to institutional mandates for restructuring. Drawing on Lévi-Strauss’s notion of bricolage and the theoretical contributions of Duymedjian and Rüling (2010), this research investigates how this bricolage can be implemented in the absence of conventional or normative space to support the process, and particularly within a context characterized by conflictual relationships. The case study analyzes the collective bricolage process and its components, demonstrating that the dialectical nature of collective bricolage facilitates the creation of robust governance structures through the negotiation and recombination of resources and rationales from the diverse actors involved.
papers.summary_ja: フランスの大学天文台の設立を通じ、高等教育・研究の大規模な変革の中で、大学ステークホルダーが集団ブリコラージュを用いいかに創意的に環境に適応するかを検証する。
papers.novelty_reason: ブリコラージュ概念の大学ガバナンスへの適用は、制度的創意性の理論化として新しく、実装事例の詳細な分析は新規である。

papers.title: Bridging the Gap in Reading Skills: The Role of Home Literacy Environment and Parental Expectations in Chinese Rural-to- Urban Migrant Children
papers.title_ja: 読書スキルのギャップ橋渡け：中国の農村から都市への移住児童における家庭読み書き環境と保護者期待の役割
papers.summary: Background Research on the Home Literacy Environment (HLE) in China has predominantly centreed on disparities between urban residents (UR) and rural-to-urban migrants (RUM), yielding substantial insights while leaving critical gaps unaddressed. Although existing literature has identified socioeconomic status (SES) as a key determinant of HLE disparities, it has frequently overlooked pivotal factors such as the duration of urban residency and parental expectations (PE) regarding children’s reading proficiency. These variables are integral to developing a holistic understanding of HLE dynamics within RUM families. Furthermore, while the adverse effects of such disparities on low-level reading skills (LLRS) among migrant children are well-established, potential variations in high-level reading skills (HLRS) remain underexamined. Reading constitutes a multifaceted cognitive process involving textual meaning construction. Grounded in theoretical frameworks such as the he triangle model and ...
papers.summary_ja: 中国における家庭読み書き環境に関する研究は都市住民と農村移住者の格差に焦点を当ててきたが、根本的ギャップが残されている。本研究は農村移住児童の読書スキル発達における家庭環境と保護者期待の影響メカニズムを検証する。

papers.title: Branding (Dis)enchantment: Exploring employer brand communications and the lived experience of employees in UK fast fashion retail.

papers.title: Reforming Jointly Owned Property in Line with Saudi Vision 2030: Socio- legal Lessons Learned from English Commonhold and South African Sectional Title
papers.title_ja: サウジアラビア・ビジョン2030に沿った共有財産法改革：英国コモンホールド制と南アフリカ区分所有制からの社会法的教訓
papers.summary: This thesis critically examines how Saudi Arabia’s Jointly owned property law and practises can be reformed to support Saudi’s 2030 housing development plan, which aims to increase home ownership in the country. Due to space restrictions and overcrowding in densely populated areas, jointly owned property is key to realising this objective. However, this thesis outlines several challenges, including inadequate legal awareness about JOP, disputes and enforcement issues, currently impede this aim, leading to an increasing demand for reforms. To address these challenges and propose appropriate reforms, this thesis adopts a comparative socio-legal methodology that brings insights from comparative doctrinal analysis into conversation with those insights gained from interviews with owners/lawyers conducted in Saudi Arabia, South Africa, and England. Employing grounded theory for data analysis, themes emerged from the data, highlighting commonalities of best practices across the jurisdictions ...
papers.summary_ja: サウジアラビアの2030年住宅開発計画を支援するため、共有不動産法およびプラクティスの改革方策を、英国とアフリカの比較法的経験を通じて検証する。人口密集地の住宅所有率向上という政策目標達成の法的枠組みを提示している。

papers.title: An Analysis of Filial Relations in the Teachings of Jesus and Muhammad from the Perspective of Comparative Ethics and Scriptural Reasoning
papers.title_ja: 比較倫理学および聖書解釈推論の視点からのイエスとムハンマドの教えにおける親孝行関係の分析
papers.summary: This thesis offers a comparative-ethical analysis of textual tensions in the teachings of Jesus and Muhammad about filial relations as well as their reception in contemporary Christian-Muslim relations. While the issue of textual tension has been widely used, and abused, in the context of religious polemics, it is virtually ignored in the practice of interreligious dialogue. One reason for the absence of effective Christian-Muslim dialogue on textual tension is the absence of a clear hermeneutical approach that facilitates and promotes mutual understanding between the two religious traditions. The problem of textual tension can be addressed if the strengths of, and opportunities presented by, interreligious dialogue and comparative ethics are brought together. Interreligious dialogue, on the one hand, has the clear purpose of promoting mutual understanding but it lacks a clear approach to the practice of dialogue. The academic study of comparative ethics, on the other hand, offers well...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、イエスとムハンマドの教えに見られるテキスト上の緊張関係、特に親孝行に関する教義を比較倫理学的に分析する。キリスト教・イスラム教間の現代的関係性における宗教的テキストの解釈問題を検討している。
papers.novelty_reason: 宗教対話と聖書解釈の融合という新しい手法だが、比較宗教学の既存枠組み内での分析にとどまっている。

papers.title: Le cinéma soviétique de la mort de Staline à la Perestroïka en dialogue avec le reste du monde : analyse des transferts culturels à l’oeuvre
papers.title_ja: スターリン死後からペレストロイカまでのソビエト映画：文化的転移プロセスの分析
papers.summary: Soviet cinema has always been a central tool for propaganda and the construction of socialism, as Vladimir Lenin emphasized when he called it ''the most important of the arts.'' In the decades following the October Revolution of 1917, this cinema glorified the ideals of the Communist Party, fulfilling the demands of socialist realism and serving the goals of the state. The Stalinist years reinforced this role, imposing strict censorship and artistic homogenization. However, Stalin's death in 1953 marked the beginning of a cultural transformation, notably driven by the Khrushchevite Thaw. This thesis explores the dynamics of Soviet cinema between Stalin's death and perestroika, highlighting the interaction between Soviet cinema and international influences. The Thaw allowed for greater thematic and stylistic freedom, fostering an artistic dialogue with the West. The influence of the French New Wave is particularly notable, with Soviet directors drawing inspiration from its innovative te...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、スターリン時代後期（1953年以降）からペレストロイカ期（1985-1991年）のソビエト映画を、世界的な映画運動との対話という視点から分析する。共産主義イデオロギー伝播の宣伝手段から芸術的自由へと向かう映画文化の転換過程を検討している。
papers.novelty_reason: 冷戦期ソビエト映画の文化的転移に注目する枠組みは新しいが、映画史研究の既知の方法論の範囲内である。

papers.title: AI and the Gothic
papers.title_ja: AIとゴシック的恐怖
papers.summary: For as long as technology has existed, there have been those who are afraid of its implications and wish to roll back its progress. One way in which this has traditionally been effected is through the use of gothic tropes to render new technologies as frightful or vampiric upon either labour or life. In this chapter, I explore the ways that gothic aspects are applied to the new breed of large language models, broadly dubbed AI. Taking a base history of artificial life and its intersection with gothic literatures, such as Frankenstein, but also more contemporary touchstones, this chapter aims to understand how gothic rhetorics influence societal uptake and acceptance or rejection of new technological inventions. This chapter will naturally also explore the unnaturalness of supposedly "playing God" and creating artificial life, a trope very much rooted in gothic traditions.
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、テクノロジーに対する不安や恐怖がゴシック的表現を通じてどのように形象化されてきたかを歴史的に検討する。特にAI時代における技術恐怖とゴシック文学的伝統の関連性を分析している。
papers.novelty_reason: テクノロジー史とゴシック文学という一見無関係な二つの領域を結合させることで、デジタル時代の文化的不安を読む新たな視座を開拓している。

papers.title: Scaling the Cosmos in the Modern Era: Images, Tools, and Instruments
papers.title_ja: 近代におけるコスモスのスケーリング：イメージ、ツール、インストルメント
papers.summary: Il convegno Scaling the Cosmos in the Modern Era: Images, Tools, and Instruments ruota attorno al concetto di scaling inteso come riferimento critico e metodologico che va oltre la semplice misurazione, ma attraversa dimensioni spaziali, temporali e cognitive, trasformando il modo in cui comprendiamo, rappresentiamo e percepiamo l’universo. Il convegno esaminerà i diversi modi in cui immagini, strumenti e dispositivi sono stati utilizzati per misurare il cosmo. Dai primi orologi astronomici e globi celesti alle moderne simulazioni digitali, ogni tipo di misurazione rivela sia le possibilità che i limiti dei nostri tentativi di comprendere l’universo.Avvalendosi delle metodologie delle scienze umane e delle scienze naturali, il convegno intende ridefinire il concetto stesso di scaling. Questo approccio interdisciplinare evidenzia l’evoluzione delle pratiche e permette di comprendere l’universo non solo come realtà fisica, ma come una complessa struttura culturale, epistemica e storica.I...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、スケーリングという概念を単なる測定ではなく、空間的・時間的・認識的次元を横断する批判的・方法論的視点として再定義する。近代科学における計測技術と世界観の関連性を検討している。
papers.novelty_reason: スケーリングを単なる科学史の技術的問題ではなく、認識論的・存在論的な問題として再構成することで、科学と人文学の統合的読み方を提示する新たな研究枠組みを創設している。

papers.title: Human Remains: Everest and the Ontological Afterlives of George Mallory and Andrew Irvine
papers.title_ja: 人間の遺体：エベレストとジョージ・マロリー及びアンドリュー・アーヴィンの存在論的な死後
papers.summary: The philosopher Giorgio Agamben has argued that the ‘human/nonhuman distinction is the conceptual ground for any further ontological elaboration’, (Grieve-Carlson, 179) that humans must distinguish themselves from their environment and other beings before the work of culture can begin. However, objects frequently ‘problematize the boundaries of the human’ (Knutson, 273), never more so than when we encounter human remains in the process of transition from human subject to physical object. The philosopher Daniel Heller-Roazen notes ‘that a corpse is no human being seems obvious, yet it is equally certain that it is no ordinary thing…A human cadaver is neither a person nor not a person. It is a nonperson in a special sense, which requires commentary and elucidation’ (Heller-Roazen,159). On Everest, the ambiguity of post-mortal personhood is exacerbated by the preservation of human remains in liminal states in the mountain cryosphere. Human remains on Everest enter new ontic states and new...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、エベレストで発見された登山家の遺体を通じて、人間/非人間の存在論的区別と死後の文化的意味を再検討する。アガンベンの哲学的議論を踏まえながら、登山という行為と死の物質性の関係を問い直している。
papers.novelty_reason: 物質的な遺体と存在論的問題を結びつけることで、従来は分離されていた人文地理学と存在論的問題を統合する新しい問題設定を創出している。

papers.title: Labour mobility in Europe: Using Planned Behaviour Theory to understand migration intentions and location choice of the highly skilled
papers.title_ja: ヨーロッパにおける労働移動性：計画的行動理論を用いた高度技能労働者の移住意思と立地選択の理解
papers.summary: Highly skilled migration is a complex phenomenon which despite its comparatively small volume continues to receive interest from a variety of disciplines, all seeking to understand what drives individuals to migrate, and where to. Migration in general has historically been assessed through an economic lens, assuming financial incentives as the key motivation, and treating the migrant as a rational actor who carefully considers their options before making a rational decision about location and time of migration. This approach, however, proves unsatisfactory because it fails to consider non-financial drivers, the individual’s social environment, and the presence of perceived challenges which all influence the decision-making process. This study applies an expanded Planned Behaviour Theory model to understand how highly skilled young Europeans form their intention to migrate, which locations they choose, and what factors influence their decision-making process before migration takes place...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、高度技能労働者の移住決定プロセスを計画的行動理論（Planned Behaviour Theory）に基づいて分析する。従来の経済学的移住モデルではなく、行動心理学的アプローチを採用している。
papers.novelty_reason: 移住研究に行動心理学的手法を導入するという新しい視点だが、既存の行動経済学の理論枠組み内の応用である。

papers.title: Predictions at war: an inferential approach to decision-making in international politics
papers.title_ja: 戦争期の予測：国際政治における意思決定への推論的アプローチ
papers.summary: This thesis introduces the inferential actor model to International Relations to address the persistent puzzle of why leaders make sub-optimal foreign policy choices. Drawing on the neuroscience theory of active inference, it reframes decision-making as a dynamic process in which uncertainty is not simply a problem of missing information but an actor-managed variable with direct implications for the decision process. The model’s validity is tested through an extended case study of Lyndon Johnson’s Vietnam strategy (1964-65), comparing its expectations with those of two stylized alternatives: a realist model rooted in rationalist assumptions and a domestic politics model. Based on extensive archival research, the thesis finds that gradual escalation was less the product of firm conviction than a costly exercise in hypothesis testing. Johnson relied on predictions about the consequences of losing South Vietnam to sustain escalation despite low confidence in his policy options. His combin...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、推論的行為主体モデルを国際関係論に導入し、なぜ指導者が準最適な外交政策を選択するのかという長年の謎に取り組む。神経科学の能動的推論理論を応用して、不確実性下での意思決定プロセスを動的に再構成する。
papers.novelty_reason: 神経科学の認知理論を国際関係論の根本的な問題に応用することで、合理選択理論を超える新しい説明枠組みを提示している。

papers.title: L’Un, l’être, les principes chez Damascius: Lecture du Traité des premiers principes
papers.title_ja: ダマスキオスにおける一者、存在、原理：『最初の原理についての問題と解決』の読解
papers.summary: This book addresses the metaphysical question of the first principles as articulated by Damascius (458/462-538) in his Problems and Solutions Concerning the First Principles (De Principiis). Damascius’ treatise is a major philosophical work of Antiquity, offering a radical and profound enquiry into principles. The present book stresses the philosophical and historical relevance of Damascius’ work with regard to this metaphysical issue and provides a detailed analysis of the De Principiis. This study is based on the hypothesis that the aporetic opening of Damascius’ treatise and his treatment of the concept of an absolute and completely ineffable principle are the first step toward an enquiry about the first principles which can be called “principles,” namely the One and its threefold manifestation as One-All, All-One, and One-Being. Recent studies have stressed Damascius’ aporetic method and the radical nature of his view regarding the concept of an absolute principle. However, little ...
papers.summary_ja: 本著作は、新プラトン主義の哲学者ダマスキオス（458/462-538年）による『最初の原理についての問題と解決』を詳細に検討する。古代の第一原理についての形而上学的問題を根本的かつ深刻に問い直している。
papers.novelty_reason: 古代哲学史の専門的な文献学的研究であり、既存の哲学史の研究方法論の枠組み内での深化である。

papers.title: Learning-driven prospect and household risk mitigation strategy under uncertain climate risks: a dynamic cumulative prospect theory approach
papers.title_ja: 不確実な気候リスク下での学習駆動型予想と世帯リスク軽減戦略：動的累積見通し理論アプローチ
papers.authors: Dey, Jishu, Mishra, Tapas, Homroy, Swarnodeep
papers.summary: How do households perceive and value the growing risks of climate change (such as floods, fires, and windstorms) in their willingness to pay a certain housing insurance premium? Does (the speed of) learning about the (in)frequency of climate-related risks shape households’ decisions to endogenize it in their future premium decisions? In this paper, we introduce the role of learning in the characterisation of a prospect function of a household. Because households invariably make decisions under uncertainty, how certain risks (such as the probability of climate-related risks) develop over time, a class of households may see their urgencies differently from others. Through a learning-based approach, we formalize an agent-based decision, particularly a cumulative prospect in a dynamic setting. This setting allows households to categorise risks (as high, low, and medium) and accordingly, as risks evolve and move to a different epoch, households’ learning-driven memory shapes their cumulativ...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、洪水・火災・暴風などの気候関連リスクに対する世帯の知覚・評価が住宅保険加入意思に与える影響を分析する。気候リスク頻度についての学習が世帯の適応的意思決定に果たす役割を動的累積見通し理論を用いて検討している。
papers.novelty_reason: 累積見通し理論を気候リスク適応に応用する新しい視点だが、既存の行動経済学理論の応用領域の拡張である。

papers.title: The Malthusian Trap: A Modern Framework for Population Growth and Climate-Induced Resource Scarcity

papers.summary: Version 5 represents a conceptual consolidation and structural refinement of the analytical framework developed in earlier versions of this study. While Version 4 substantially expanded the biophysical core of the analysis by examining the interacting Earth-system processes that constrain planetary regenerative capacity, Version 5 further strengthens the theoretical architecture of the framework by clarifying the historical and systemic origins of these dynamics. The introductory section has been reorganized to articulate the causal chain linking fossil-fuel industrialization, the doctrine of perpetual economic growth, and the resulting destabilization of planetary systems. A new opening section reconstructs the historical escape from classical Malthusian limits through fossil energy, analyzes the expansion of global population and consumption under industrial civilization, and explains how these processes produced a condition of planetary-scale ecological overshoot. Rather than presen...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、バージョン4の生物物理学的核を拡張し、地球システムプロセスの相互作用と惑星的制約条件を検討した上で、現代の人口増加と資源枯渇の問題を理論的に再構成する。古典的マルサス理論を21世紀の気候・資源危機に適用した概念的フレームワークを提示している。
papers.subfield: Renewable Energy, Sustainability and the Environment

papers.title: Three Essays on Applied Econometrics
papers.title_ja: 応用計量経済学の三つのエッセイ：制度変化が経済成果に与える影響
papers.summary: This dissertation consists of three chapters, unified by a central inquiry into how institutional changes and policy shifts shape economic outcomes and social equity in China. Each chapter examines a distinct policy transformation—family planning, labor market reform, and trade liberalization—through the lens of inequality, mobility, and power. While the contexts differ, the overarching theme is clear: the distributional consequences of economic policies are profoundly mediated by social norms, political incentives, and pre-existing structures of advantage.
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、中国における三つの異なる政策転換（一人っ子政策、労働市場改革、通商自由化）が経済成果と社会的公平性に与える影響を計量経済学的に分析する。制度的変化と経済的不平等の関連性を検証している。

papers.title: The seminal proteome of a monandrous fly, Drosophila subobscura
papers.title_ja: 一夫一妻制のハエDrosophila subobscuraの精液プロテオーム
papers.summary: When females mate with multiple males, ejaculates from different partners compete within the female reproductive tract. Males gain a competitive advantage by transferring seminal fluid proteins (Sfps) that manipulate female post-mating responses, such as reducing female propensity to remate. But in monandrous species, where females typically mate only once, post-mating sexual selection is absent, raising key questions about the complexity and identity of Sfps in monandrous seminal proteomes. To address this, we characterised the seminal proteome of the monandrous fly Drosophila subobscura. Using long-read RNA-seq, we created improved gene models for the D. subobscura accessory gland and ejaculatory duct, then, using a label-free quantitative proteomics approach, we identified 172 Sfps. This number is comparable to the 153 Sfps previously reported in polyandrous D. melanogaster using a similar approach. The D. subobscura seminal proteome contains all the D. melanogaster sex peptide netw...
papers.summary_ja: 複数の雄と交配する雌の場合、異なるパートナーの射出物が雌の生殖道内で競争する。雄は精液流体タンパク質(Sfps)を転移させることで競争上の優位性を獲得し、雌の再交配傾向の低下などの交配後反応を操作する。本研究は一夫一妻制のハエにおける精液プロテオームの特性を調査している。
papers.novelty_reason: 精液プロテオームの研究は既知だが、一夫一妻制種での詳細な比較分析は新しい視点を提供している。

papers.title: A Human Pan-Disease Whole Blood Transcriptomics Atlas Reveals Systemic Signatures Across Diseases
papers.title_ja: 全血トランスクリプトミクスによる人間汎疾患アトラス：疾患横断的な全身性シグネチャーの解明
papers.summary: This dataset accompanies the manuscript titled “A Human Pan-Disease Whole Blood Transcriptomics Atlas Reveals Systemic Signatures Across Diseases” Whole-blood transcriptomics (WBT) provides critical insights into systemic health and disease. In this study, we established a large-scale WBT Atlas comprising 4,444 samples across 98 distinct health conditions. Through integrative analyses, we identified disease-specific gene expression signatures and developed a multi-omics classification framework capable of distinguishing among these conditions based on their unique transcriptomic profiles. The dataset includes RNA-seq data from 4,444 samples used for atlas construction, along with 10 cohorts utilized for machine learning–based external validation.
papers.summary_ja: 本研究は全血トランスクリプトミクス(WBT)による大規模なアトラスを構築し、複数の疾患における全身性の健康・疾患シグネチャーを同定した。全血トランスクリプトミクスは全身の健康状態と疾患に関する重要な知見を提供する。
papers.novelty_reason: 複数疾患を横断的に比較する統合的トランスクリプトミクスアトラスは、従来の単一疾患中心の研究から新たな解析パラダイムへ転換している。

papers.title: The Spatiotemporal evolutionary dynamics of crickets and their influencing factors (Orthoptera; Ensifera)
papers.title_ja: コオロギの時空的進化動態とその影響要因（直翅目；キリギリス亜目）
papers.authors: Zheng, Yanna, Nie, Yimeng, Liu, Xuanzeng, Ma, Libin, Huang, Yuan
papers.summary: The mechanisms underlying the formation of species diversity have remained a subject of intense debate. In this study, we used Gryllidea (crickets) as a representative lineage and employed a phylogenetic comparative framework based on a robust phylogeny reconstructed from ultraconserved elements, mitochondrial genomes, nuclear ribosomal genes, DNA barcodes, and morphological traits. Our spatiotemporal evolutionary analyses indicate Gryllidea originated in the Early Jurassic, diverging into Grylloidea and Gryllotalpoidea, with marked increases in diversification rates at the ancestral node of Grylloidea and within Trigonidiinae and Goniogryllus of Gryllinae. Most species within these rapidly diversifying clades are distributed in the Oriental and Sino-Japanese regions. Integrating biotic (genomic and morphological) and abiotic (climatic and geographic) factors, we reveal that cricket diversification results from synergistic interactions of multiple factors, with biotic factors exerting ...

papers.title: Agta hunter-gatherer oral microbiomes are shaped by contact network structure
papers.title_ja: アグタ狩猟採集民の口腔マイクロバイオームは接触ネットワーク構造に形成される
papers.authors: Federico Musciotto, Begoña Dobón, Michael Greenacre, Álex Mira, Nikhil Chaudhary, Guz Deniz Salali, Pascale Gerbault, Rodoplh Schlaepfer, Leonora H. Astete, Marilyn Ngales
papers.summary: Here we investigate the effects of extensive sociality and mobility on the oral microbiome of 138 Agta hunter-gatherers from the Philippines. Our comparisons of microbiome composition showed that the Agta are more similar to Central African Bayaka hunter-gatherers than to neighbouring farmers. We also defined the Agta social microbiome as a set of 137 oral bacteria (only 7% of 1980 amplicon sequence variants) significantly influenced by social contact (quantified through wireless sensors of short-range interactions). We show that large interaction networks including strong links between close kin, spouses, and even unrelated friends, can significantly predict bacterial transmission networks across Agta camps. Finally, we show that more central individuals to social networks are also bacterial supersharers. We conclude that hunter-gatherer social microbiomes are predominantly pathogenic and were shaped by evolutionary tradeoffs between extensive sociality and disease spread.
papers.summary_ja: フィリピンのアグタ狩猟採集民138名の口腔マイクロバイオームに対する広範な社会性と移動性の影響を調査した。マイクロバイオーム組成の比較により、アグタが隣接する農民よりも中央アフリカのバイアカ狩猟採集民に類似していることが示された。

papers.summary: The thesis examines how self-censorship manifests in Saudi cinema and how it defines on-screen representations and aesthetics. Conventional studies on film censorship have typically adopted a binary framework, positioning filmmakers in opposition to institutional censorship. In contrast, this thesis reconfigures the discourse by treating filmmakers as active agents in the censorship process. Framed by the theoretical work of Michel Foucault and Christian Metz, the study moves beyond traditional definitions of censorship to explore how self-censorship operates at multiple levels: internalized, conforming, and resistant. Internalized self-censorship is an unconscious, ingrained power of discipline, manifesting as automatic practices shaped by the filmmaker’s internalization of societal expectations and a result of functioning within a panoptic environment. papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、サウジアラビア映画における自己検閲がいかに画面上の表現と美学を定義しているかを検証する。従来の映画検閲研究は、映画製作者と制度的検閲の対立という二項対立的枠組みを採用してきたが、本論文はこれを超越した分析を提供する。

Intimate Ecologies works to trace lineages of Indigenous lifeways and ontologies that might be interpreted as queer interspecies relations or entanglements, through visual aesthetics, impossibilities of language and coded oral histories. These histories and visualities surface through Black feminist methodologies of conversation, critical speculative fabulation and decolonial visual analysis, in an attempt to navigate a field made murky by the imposed taboos and violences of colonial occupation and epistemicide. Intimate Ecologies is praxis, ritual and speculation; it is a mode of becoming-with; it is a methodology for Black resistances of climate colonialism and Bla...

papers.summary: Turkish Folk Instruments and Voices in Contemporary Music (TFIVCM) is the first instrumentation resource which covers in depth the folk instruments and voices of Türkiye and Anatolia and their inclusion in contemporary music. papers.title: Writing as Spiritual Practice: Beyond Dominant Narratives.
papers.title_ja: 執筆を精神的実践として：支配的ナラティブを超えて
papers.summary: This PhD in Creative and Critical Writing – Writing as Spiritual Practice: Beyond Dominant Narratives – explores addiction as a spiritual and developmental condition shaped by extractive corporate capitalism and considers how memoir can both reflect and resist dominant recovery narratives. Drawing on my lived experience of addiction and recovery, as well as my work as a peer support outreach worker, the project examines writing as a spiritual and political practice capable of unsettling ideological narratives that commodify suffering and reinforce neoliberal ideas of the self. The project comprises two interdependent components: a 40,000-word dissertation and a memoir, Practicing Dying. These are not separate entities, but two ways of making the same argument. Where Practicing Dying emerges from embodied experience, the critical component situates that experience within broader political, spiritual, and theoretical frames. Rather than seeking to prove the memoir’s insights in academic ...
papers.summary_ja: 本博士論文は、中毒を搾取的な企業資本主義によって形成された精神的かつ発達的条件として探究し、回想録がいかに支配的な回復ナラティブを反映し抵抗できるかを考察する。創造的執筆と精神的成長の関係を再定義している。
papers.novelty_reason: 創造的執筆を精神的実践として再構築する視点は新しいが、自伝的執筆と心理的治癒の既知の関連性の内で展開されている。

papers.title: The Chaosmos of the Mycological Russian Avant-Garde: Key Nodes of Its Aesthetics The Kandinsky Case: The Visuality of Alchemy and the Search for the Invisible
papers.title_ja: 菌学的ロシア前衛の混沌性：その美学の重要結節 カンディンスキーのケース：錬金術の可視性と不可視なもの探究
papers.summary: The theme of occultism and the avant-garde seems to move, as it were, from marginalia to a metanarrative. In her now-classic article on Kandinsky’s anarchic occultism, Washton Long begins by asserting that occultism, mysticism, and radical political currents—anarchism in particular—exerted a far more significant influence on the formation of modernism and abstraction than traditional art history has been willing to acknowledge. As is well known, Kandinsky was closely connected with circles in which political, religious, and artistic utopias sought ways out of the “cruel rationality” of modern civilization. In his concealed essence Kandinsky appears as a mystico-anarchist, for whom, in particular, the concept of spiritual anarchy proves crucial. Here it is also necessary to reflect on the dialectic of opposition between the material and the spiritual in Kandinsky: the artist as a rule covertly positions himself against a positivist worldview, against commercialized art, and, in effect, ...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、神秘主義と前衛芸術という従来周辺的とみなされたテーマが、メタナラティブへと上昇していく過程を追跡する。カンディンスキーの無政府主義的神秘主義における、神秘主義と根本的な政治的潮流の相互作用を再評価する。
papers.novelty_reason: 神秘主義と政治急進主義をロシア前衛の中核的なアイデア形成要因として位置付け直す視点が、芸術史の解釈に新たな方向性をもたらしている。

papers.title: Children's artistic expressions : weaving the threads of cultural diversity
papers.title_ja: 児童の芸術的表現：文化的多様性の糸を織る
papers.summary: Al-Sadu is a traditional weaving technique, which has historically been practised by Bedouin women living in the Arabian Peninsula. Al-Sadu weaving performs a dual role both as a functional craft, which provides nomadic communities with the physical resources that they require to survive in the desert, and an aesthetic means of expressing tribal and communal identities. The researcher is a practitioner of weaving and was a teacher of art in Kuwait. This study explores the utility of and engagement with Al-Sadu in greater depth. The study incorporates a mini-ethnographic research design underwritten by the philosophy of practice-based research. The study aims to identify and describe how children in two differing cultural contexts - the UK and Kuwait - respond to the 'Woven Dialogues' sculpture and express themselves through art and woven materials. 78 children aged between 9 and 11 were recruited from two UK schools and one Kuwaiti school. Data were collected through drawings, weavings...
papers.summary_ja: アル・サドゥはアラビア半島のベドウィン女性が歴史的に実践してきた伝統的な織布技法である。この技法は、砂漠環境での遊牧民の生存に必要な物質的資源を提供する機能的工芸と同時に、文化的意義を果たしている。
papers.novelty_reason: 伝統的工芸を児童教育と文化多様性の文脈で再検討する試みは新しいが、文化遺産教育の既存枠組み内での応用に該当する。

papers.title: Affective enactment in narrative space : readers' encounters with contemporary British urban fiction
papers.title_ja: ナラティブ空間における情動的実行：現代イギリス都市フィクションとの読者の遭遇
papers.summary: [Affective enactment in narrative space : readers' encounters with contemporary British urban fiction]
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、情動的反応と都市フィクション体験の関係を分析する。読者の身体的、感情的遭遇がいかに都市ナラティブ解釈を形成するかを探究する。
papers.novelty_reason: 情動的読書経験の研究は新しい視点だが、ナラティブ理論と情動的応答に関する既存の研究枠組み内での発展である。

papers.title: Psychogeography in the twenty-first century : embodiment and the city
papers.title_ja: 21世紀のサイコジオグラフィー：身体性と都市
papers.summary: Psychogeography in the Twenty-First Century: Embodiment and the City offers an updated and comprehensive study of urban practice through the intersections of urbanity, sociology, politics, aesthetics, and the sciences. Building on foundational texts such as Merlin Coverley’s work, this study highlights contemporary methodologies that reflect the diverse backgrounds and embodied experiences of psychogeographers in urban environments. Its examination of recent works of key figures, including Laura Oldfield Ford, Nicola White Mudlark, Priti Pandurangan, and McKenzie Wark, emphasizes their intentional use of digital technologies, online platforms and exhibitions to share détourné artifacts (e.g., writings, photographs, drawings, and maps, as demonstrated at the Fourth World Congress of Psychogeography) as counter-narratives to institutionalized portrayals of the city. In doing so, Psychogeography in the Twenty-First Century also underscores the significance of multimodality and transmedial...
papers.summary_ja: 本著は都市実践を都市性、社会学、政治学、美学および科学の交差点から包括的に再検証する。メルリン・カバレーの基礎的著作に基づきながら、21世紀の都市体験を再構成している。
papers.novelty_reason: 従来のサイコジオグラフィーの理論的基盤を更新し、複数の学際的視点から都市実践の新しい理論化を提示している。

papers.novelty_reason: 戦後演劇史の新しい解釈を提供するが、リアリズム演劇研究の既存の学問的枠組み内での再考察である。

papers.title: Mnemonic Conviviality in ‘Post-Cold War’ Britain:Entangled Memories in Urban Space
papers.title_ja: 「ポスト冷戦」ブリテンにおける記憶の相互性：都市空間に絡み合う記憶
papers.summary: This article asks how sharing everyday memories in Britain’s superdiverse urban spaces can foster understanding across difference. Drawing on narratives and images produced in 39 arts based photography workshops in West Bromwich and Hyson Green, it develops the concept of mnemonic conviviality: a mode of “living with difference” grounded in the exchange of personal, familial, and collective memories. Through a multi sited, multi group methodology – combining photovoice, visual analysis, and ethnographic dialogue – the article demonstrates how ordinary objects, places, and images spark conversations that entangle memories of socialism, post socialism, colonialism and migration. Through these micro narratives, participants forge temporary commonalities while revealing the enduring impact of the Cold War, colonial hierarchies, and racialisation on contemporary British life. The article demonstrates how memory studies can deepen understandings of conviviality in hyperlocal superdiverse spa...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、ブリテンの超多様的な都市空間における日常的記憶の共有が、如何に差異を越えた理解を育成できるかを問う。39回の芸術基盤写真ワークショップから生成されたナラティブと画像を通じて、記憶の相互性の概念を発展させている。
papers.novelty_reason: 多民族都市空間における記憶の共有と相互理解の形成を新しい視点から理論化し、都市研究と社会包括性研究に新たな方向性を示している。
papers.source_name: University of Birmingham Research Portal (University of Birmingham)

papers.title: Photographier l'absence. La violence invisible de la disparition forcée en Colombie depuis 1990
papers.title_ja: 不在を写真に撮る：コロンビアにおける1990年以降の強制失踪の見えない暴力
papers.summary: In its final report published in 2022, the Colombian Truth Commission documented 121,768 cases of enforced disappearance in the country between 1985 and 2016, with statistical estimation models suggesting over 210,000 cases. The signing of definitive peace agreements with the country’s oldest guerrilla group (FARC-EP) in 2017 may have marked an official end to the armed conflict, yet the issue of enforced disappearances remains highly relevant: not only because disappearances continue to occur today, but also because the country faces memorial debt toward its thousands of missing persons and their families.Enforced disappearance is commonly described as an “invisible” crime, deprived of possible images. Indeed, this form of violence aims both at ensuring the impunity of its perpetrators and at the radical erasure—both physical and identity-based—of its victims, leaving their relatives in a state of uncertainty and terror. In this sense, it constitutes a form of violence devoid of visib...
papers.summary_ja: 2022年に発表されたコロンビア真実委員会の最終報告書は、1985年から2016年間に121,768件の強制失踪を記録し、統計推定モデルは210,000件以上を示唆している。国最古のゲリラ勢力との平和協定締結後も、この問題は持続している。
papers.novelty_reason: 強制失踪という不可視の暴力を写真表象の理論的枠組みで新たに可視化し、人権芸術と痕跡の理論に革新的な貢献をもたらしている。

papers.title: Fashion on the Frontier: Photography, Time and Colonial Modernity on the Madeira-Mamoré Railroad, Brazil
papers.title_ja: 辺境のファッション：ブラジル・マデイラ・マモレ鉄道における写真、時間、植民地的近代性
papers.summary: Fashion on the Frontier: Photography, Time and Colonial Modernity on the Madeira-Mamoré Railroad, Brazil (2026) examines the relationship between fashion, photography and the temporal regimes of colonial modernity in the Brazilian Amazon. It explores how land was demarcated with the expansion of the North American frontier in South America, but also how the contours of different ethnic and racialised bodies were delineated and articulated through fashion and via the pseudo-scientific medium of photography. It moves across diverse fields of thought to consider histories and theories of photography and fashion, modernity and coloniality, labour and domesticity, gender and whiteness, whilst deploying innovative and pertinent historical methodologies for thinking about archival hegemonies and silences. By interrogating History as a critical practice in the fashioning of Latin America, her research questions the emphases and erasures that haunt Brazilian fashion histories.
papers.summary_ja: 本論文は、ブラジル・アマゾン地域のマデイラ・マモレ鉄道拡張に伴う土地分割の過程において、ファッション、写真、植民地的近代性の時間体制の関係を検証する。辺境における表象と近代性の複雑な関係を解明している。
papers.novelty_reason: 植民地的近代性、ファッション史、写真の時間性を統合し、辺境地域の文化的実践に新たな理論的照射を当てている。

papers.title: Re-imagining Fashion Histories: Enacting Decolonial Commitments in Institutional Spaces
papers.title_ja: ファッション史を再考する：機関的空間における脱植民地化コミットメントの実行
papers.summary: This chapter explores how decolonial commitments are enacted and contested in institutional spaces, and the possibilities and tensions this can generate. It examines as a case study the ‘Re-imagining Fashion Histories: Tracing Parallel Cosmologies’ module co-taught at Central Saint Martins, London on the MA Fashion Communication course in 2024/25. This module foregrounded the otherwise in fashion historiography to animate and interrogate ‘imagining’ as a practice that constitutes and reinforces coloniality but simultaneously forges decolonial potentialities. ‘Imagining’ acts to define the suppositions, assumptions and representations that have shaped the canon of fashion history, but simultaneously to re-imagine alternative fashion futures beyond an Anglo-Eurocentric and anthropocentric bias. We employ time as a theoretical entry point into discussions concerning power and coloniality. Our contention is that to re-imagine is not to go backwards, but to radically undo, unravel and delin...
papers.summary_ja: 本章は、機関的空間において脱植民地化コミットメントがいかに実行され争点化されるか、またそれが生成する可能性と緊張を探究する。ロンドンのセントラル・セント・マーティンズで共同教授された「ファッション史の再想像：並行する宇宙誌の追跡」モジュールをケーススタディとしている。
papers.novelty_reason: ファッション教育における脱植民地化の実践的実行を理論化し、美術館・教育機関における脱植民地化プロジェクトの新たなモデルを提示している。

papers.title: Russian Historical Anarchism Reconsidered: Crossroads of Modernism, Political Imagination, and Cultural Theory
papers.title_ja: ロシア歴史的無政府主義の再考：近代主義、政治的想像力、文化理論の交差点
papers.summary: This paper offers a comprehensive re-evaluation of Russian historical anarchism, interpreting it not as a marginal ideological strain but as a metaphysical and aesthetic movement, the intensity of which exceeds the constraints of conventional political theory. Tracing its genealogy from Bakunin to the Gordin brothers, and engaging with figures as diverse as Tolstoy, Bely, and Malevich, the study reveals a continuum between ontological rebellion, symbolic sabotage, and the aesthetic production of radical form. Russian anarchism is shown to operate not merely as political refusal but as a cultural and semiotic matrix that undercuts the metaphysics of order and representation. From the radical language of Zaum’ to cosmo-linguistic utopianism, this article delineates anarchism as a modality of epistemic destitution and ontological subversion. Interfacing with Western theories of deconstruction, biopower, and destituent potentiality, the Russian archive reveals anarchism’s deeper vocation: ...
papers.summary_ja: 本論文はロシア歴史的無政府主義を周辺的な思想の系統としてではなく、従来の政治理論の制約を超える強度を持つ形而上学的かつ美学的運動として包括的に再評価する。バクーニンから現在までの系譜を辿る。
papers.novelty_reason: 無政府主義を美学的・形而上学的運動として再定位し、ロシア文化理論の新たな解釈枠組みを構築している。

papers.title: Theatre of the Tech-Oppressed: Exploring algorithmic injustice through participatory performances
papers.title_ja: 圧制された者の演劇技法：参加的パフォーマンスを通じたアルゴリズム的不正義の探究
papers.authors: Babai, Najme, Duvall, Eva, Iivari, Netta, Kinnula, Marianne, Iversen, Ole Sejer; id_orcid 0000-0002-8055-6716
papers.summary: As artificial intelligence (AI) becomes embedded in systems that shape everyday decisions, it is critical to engage young people in making sense of these technologies and their sociotechnical implications. This paper explores how participatory, theater-based methods, particularly Theater of the Oppressed, can foster critical dialogues among youth about algorithmic decision-making, bias, and injustice. Drawing on a workshop with 15–17-year-olds, we analyze forum theater performances that surfaced questions about power, merit, data, and justice in AI systems for decision-making. Through reflective thematic analysis of the performances and spectactor interventions, we identify how participants impersonated algorithmic agents, questioned meritocratic ideals, exposed the role of data in enabling bias, and experimented with hierarchical and imaginative strategies for intervention. Our findings demonstrate the potential of embodied, performative approaches to support computational empowerment...
papers.summary_ja: 人工知能が日常的決定を形作るシステムに組み込まれるにつれ、若者をこれらのテクノロジーとその社会技術的含意の理解に関与させることが重要である。本論文は、特に圧制された者の演劇技法を用いた参加的な演劇ベースの方法がいかにアルゴリズム的不正義を可視化するかを探究する。
papers.novelty_reason: 演劇的実践をAIガバナンスと社会的正義の課題に適用する新たな可能性を開拓し、テックノクリティカル芸術実践の新しい領域を形成している。

papers.title: Picture This: A new sociocultural ‘layered listening framework’ that promotes participation through documentary photography, with young children whose families have migrated to the UK.
papers.title_ja: これを見て：英国に移民した子ども家族向けの参加を促進する新しい社会文化的「段階的リスニング枠組み」、紀録写真
papers.summary: High quality, equitable early childhood education and care (ECEC) is significant for the participation of children whose families have migrated to the UK. The rich lived experiences, perspectives and funds of knowledge of newly arrived children are largely invisible and there is an increased risk of social exclusion as a consequence. Drawing upon the findings of a three-year study using child-led photography and photo story books to explore three- to four-year-old children’s funds of knowledge, this chapter offers an original theoretical and pedagogic ‘layered listening framework’ (LLF) that blurs sociocultural theory and visual theories for deep listening with young children. This novel conceptualisation, comprising intuitive and wise photography; ambiguity; photographing democratically and ‘elastic spaces’ suggests an expanded guide for understanding how children as ‘photographer-authors’ co-create diverse perspectives about their lived experiences as pedagogical possibilities. Furth...
papers.summary_ja: 英国に移民した子ども家族向けの質の高い、公平な幼児教育保育は重要である。新規到着児童の豊かな生きた経験、視点、知識資産は大部分が不可視化されており、オンタリオのファンドとしての知識活用リスクが増加している。
papers.novelty_reason: 移民児童教育における写真的実践の適用は新しいアプローチだが、参加型学習と文化的尊重の既存の教育学的関心内での実装である。

papers.title: Main rooms and coffered ceilings as definers of a noble palace model in renaissance Spain. The case study of the palace of Peñaranda de Duero, Spain
papers.title_ja: スペイン貴族宮殿モデルの定義者としての主室と格天井：ペニャランダ・デ・ドゥエロ宮殿のケーススタディ、スペイン
papers.authors: Manuel de Miguel Sánchez, Miguel Carlos Fernández Cabo, Ana González Uriel
papers.summary: The palace of the Counts of Miranda in Pe & ntilde;aranda de Duero (Burgos) is one of the main palatial works of the Spanish Renaissance of 16th century Castilian nobility. Here we find a harmonious coexistence between the Gothic and Hispano-Islamic traditions and the emerging Renaissance trends. Previous studies have highlighted that the Renaissance in the Iberian Peninsula has not been adequately valued due to its hybrid nature. Studying works such as this one aim to deepen the understanding of the evolution of this architectural model in its passage from the Middle Ages to the Renaissance. The methodology has consisted of studying the architecture and its decorations from a morphological, geometric and decorative point of view and comparing them with those of other palaces of the time. For this purpose, drawings of its characteristic elements have been made from a 3D laser scanning and automated photogrammetry survey. Among these the coffered ceilings stand out because they define t...
papers.summary_ja: ペニャランダ・デ・ドゥエロ（ブルゴス県）のミランダ伯爵の宮殿は、16世紀カスティーリャ貴族による最重要スペイン・ルネサンス建築作品の一つである。ここではゴシック様式とイスパーノ・イスラム伝統の調和的共存と、新興するルネサンス的傾向が見られる。
papers.novelty_reason: ルネサンス建築の詳細な建築学的分析であるが、建築史研究の従来の方法論に基づくケーススタディである。

papers.title: A feminine image of the city from Rio de Janeiro’s urban periphery: audiovisual practices, representations and imaginaries

papers.novelty_reason: グローバルサウスの周辺地域における映像表現と女性的視点を統合し、都市研究におけるジェンダーと地政学的不均等に新たな方向性をもたらしている。
